selection: 按 7–10 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: vi. 逐渐消失, 逐渐减少

words.translation: n. 城堡, 象棋中的车；vt. 置于城堡中, 盘踞于
words.definition: n. a large building formerly occupied by a ruler and fortified against attack

words.translation: n. 梅格（女子名, 等于Margaret）
words.definition: n the number that is represented as a one followed by 6 zeros

words.translation: n. 椅子的背罩, 装杂物的容器；a. 整齐的, 有条理的
words.definition: n. receptacle that holds odds and ends (as sewing materials)

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词

words.translation: n. 护士, 保姆, 奶妈；vt. 看护, 照顾, 培养
words.definition: n. one skilled in caring for young children or the sick (usually under the supervision of a physician)

words.translation: n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职

words.translation: a. 好笑的, 有趣的, 滑稽的；n. 滑稽人物

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王

words.translation: a. 庄重的, 壮观的, 显赫的, 重大的, 最高的, 雄伟的, 宏大的, 豪华的, 傲慢的
words.definition: s. large and impressive in physical size or extent

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞

words.translation: n. 笑, 笑声；vi. 笑, 大笑

words.translation: n. 衣服

words.translation: abbr. let us 让我们
